title: The Crew Faces the Heat
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on the crew faces the heat, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Faces the Heat. The crew reaches Yuba and sees what the drought and rebellion have done to the people who still believe in Alabasta. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: operation,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: utopia.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That is the name of the final plan,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We the Baroque Works shall carry out.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: C-Maintain a

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Croco- Dile!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ah, good...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So you're all already familiar with the man himself.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We've got a real big-name here now...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Of course we know him! But more importantly, why would one of the Shichibukai be...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So we were following a pirate's orders all along!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: "You're" our boss...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Any complaints?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We're not complaining here. We're just confused why a Shichibukai,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A pirate officially sanctioned by the World Government, would go all the way out and form a criminal organization...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What I desire isn't money or land...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's military might!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Military night...?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Allow me to explain from the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: My true objective and the full picture behind the final operation of Baroque Works...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Jhere's really something like that here in this country!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: QWhy, 9'm giddy as a little school- girl now!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Qtnd we're gonna be stealing it along with this entire country!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So in short, our objective this time is to ensure the successful completion of this plan, correct...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Correct. Everything you've ever done for Baroque Works,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Was all to build up for this final operation.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Inside the letter in front of you are the final orders I shall leave to you.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The time to end the Kingdom of Alabasta has come...

summary: This part develops the crew faces the heat and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
